    C

    calculateCurrentBalance(BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Method in class com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.service.UserFinancialStateService
    Calculates the real current balance.
    calculateDailyAvailable(BigDecimal, List) - Method in class com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.service.UserFinancialStateService
    Calculates daily available money considering future transactions.
    calculateExpenses(List) - Method in class com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.service.UserFinancialStateService
    Sums all expense transactions of the month.
    calculateIncome(List) - Method in class com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.service.UserFinancialStateService
    Sums all income transactions of the month.
    calculateMonthInitialBalance(User) - Method in class com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.service.UserFinancialStateService
    Calculates the initial balance of the month by summing all past transactions.
    calculateTodayAvailable(BigDecimal, List) - Method in class com.abrahamquintana.personalfinancemanager.service.UserFinancialStateService
    Calculates today's available money.
